data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for user-owned calendar connections and event feeds.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for user-owned calendar connections and event feeds. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data points that confirm the existence or functionality of these calendar connections and event feeds. The linked use case mentions the need for user-owned calendar connections, but without concrete evidence, it is impossible to assert that this requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming user-owned calendar connections and event feeds.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for calendar connections
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of user-owned calendar connections and event feeds.
